title: player_shops
description: Shops Players on Either Vanilla or Spigot / Paper Servers can use for their players to shop and enjoy!
body:
# Mr_Chibi's Player Shops Allows players to create shops, Interact with shops [Sell] or [Buy], Collect Payments & interact with their community! ## What types of servers is compatible with? * Pure Vanilla Servers * Spigot / Paper ### What features does it offer? * It’s Singleplayer & Multiplayer Friendly! * Shops Contain "9" Slots for players to shop and browse compared to "1"! * Shops are linked to Players. * Player's can close their shop to access payments. * Player's can open their shop allow public to access and shop. * 64 Items per slots, but you use admin commands items can be to "limited" & "unlimited"! *** ### Shop Admin Permissions: * To enable "administrator mode" server operator must toggle following command: /team join mcs_admin [username]
* To disable "administrator mode" server operator must toggle following command: /team leave [username] ### Shop Admin Commands: Example, below is a list of **Admin Commands**:
  • /trigger mcs_unlimited - Allows shop to sell items unlimited!
  • /trigger mcs_limited - Reverts items back to original counts and no, longer unlimited
  • /trigger mcs_open - Forces players shop open.
  • /trigger mcs_close - Forces player shop close.
  • /trigger mcs_remove - Force removes a players shop.
*** ### Player Shop Commands > List of commands that "shop owners" can use while in 0-5 block distance.
  • /trigger mcs_help - Displays a list of player shop commands.
  • /trigger mcs_create - Creates a shop.
  • /trigger mcs_open - Opens the shop to the public to browse.
  • /trigger mcs_close - Locks the shop from the public.
  • /trigger mcs_remove - Removes shop.
### Player Shop Purchasing: > Commands "Shop Guests" can use while in 0-5 block distance.
  • /trigger mcs_buy set [amount] - Player must Right click "chest" then, click in chat the [gui] button or /trigger mcs_buy set [amount].
